metadata.note: Paper-aligned: validation 2007-2022, holdout 2023-2024, min train 8y (2016 days). Annual tuning schedule: (1) python tune_sjm_hyperparameters.py --config hyperparam/paper_aligned.json --mode symmetric --no-wandb; (2) python tune_sjm_hyperparameters.py --config hyperparam/paper_aligned.json --mode asymmetric --no-wandb
